option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.DatePicker?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Hyperlink?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleGroup?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.InscriptionController" stylesheets="@../styles/auth.css" styleClass="auth-root"> <fx:define> <ToggleGroup fx:id="roleToggleGroup"/> </fx:define>
<left> <VBox spacing="18" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="auth-signup-hero"> <padding> <Insets top="44" right="44" bottom="44" left="44"/> </padding> <Label text="Artium" styleClass="auth-brand"/> <Label text="Explore the World" styleClass="auth-hero-title"/> <Label text="Rejoignez votre espace desktop avec une inscription plus fluide, plus claire et plus dynamique." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-hero-text"/> <HBox spacing="10" styleClass="auth-chip-row"> <Label text="Rapide" styleClass="auth-chip"/> <Label text="Sécurisé" styleClass="auth-chip"/> <Label text="Guidé" styleClass="auth-chip"/> </HBox> </VBox> </left>
<center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="auth-scroll"> <content> <StackPane styleClass="auth-signup-shell"> <VBox spacing="18" maxWidth="720" styleClass="auth-card auth-signup-card"> <padding> <Insets top="34" right="34" bottom="34" left="34"/> </padding>
<VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Créer un compte" styleClass="auth-title"/> <Label text="Remplissez les informations en 3 étapes pour garder une expérience propre et lisible." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-subtitle"/> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="10" styleClass="auth-stepper"> <Label fx:id="stepOneBadge" text="1" styleClass="auth-step-badge active"/> <Label fx:id="stepTwoBadge" text="2" styleClass="auth-step-badge"/> <Label fx:id="stepThreeBadge" text="3" styleClass="auth-step-badge"/> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="stepOnePane" spacing="12"> <Label text="Informations personnelles" styleClass="auth-section-title"/> <GridPane hgap="12" vgap="12"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> </columnConstraints>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"> <Label text="Nom" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="nomField" promptText="Entrez le nom" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1"> <Label text="Prénom" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="prenomField" promptText="Entrez le prénom" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"> <Label text="Date de naissance" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <DatePicker fx:id="dateNaissancePicker" promptText="jj/mm/aaaa" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1"> <Label text="Téléphone" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="phoneField" promptText="+216 XX XXX XXX" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.columnSpan="2"> <Label text="Ville" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="villeField" promptText="Entrez la ville" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox> </GridPane> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="stepTwoPane" spacing="12" visible="false" managed="false"> <Label text="Informations de connexion" styleClass="auth-section-title"/> <GridPane hgap="12" vgap="12"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> </columnConstraints>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.columnSpan="2"> <Label text="Adresse e-mail" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="emailField" promptText="Votre adresse e-mail" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"> <Label text="Mot de passe" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" promptText="Au moins 8 caractères" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1"> <Label text="Confirmation" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <PasswordField fx:id="confirmPasswordField" promptText="Répétez le mot de passe" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox> </GridPane> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="stepThreePane" spacing="12" visible="false" managed="false"> <Label text="Rôle et compléments" styleClass="auth-section-title"/> <HBox spacing="10" styleClass="auth-role-row"> <ToggleButton text="Amateur" toggleGroup="$roleToggleGroup" selected="true" styleClass="auth-role-toggle"/> <ToggleButton text="Artiste" toggleGroup="$roleToggleGroup" styleClass="auth-role-toggle"/> <ToggleButton text="Admin" toggleGroup="$roleToggleGroup" styleClass="auth-role-toggle"/> </HBox>
<GridPane hgap="12" vgap="12"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> </columnConstraints>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"> <Label fx:id="specialiteLabel" text="Spécialité" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="specialiteField" promptText="Ex. peinture, illustration..." styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1"> <Label fx:id="centreInteretLabel" text="Centre d'intérêt" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="centreInteretField" promptText="Ex. art contemporain..." styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.columnSpan="2"> <Label text="Biographie" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextArea fx:id="biographieArea" promptText="Parlez-nous de vous..." prefRowCount="4" wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-input auth-textarea"/> </VBox> </GridPane>
<VBox spacing="8"> <Label text="Photo de référence" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <HBox spacing="14" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <StackPane styleClass="auth-photo-preview"> <Label fx:id="photoPlaceholderLabel" text="Aucune photo" styleClass="auth-photo-placeholder"/> </StackPane> <VBox spacing="6" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="photoPathLabel" text="Sélectionnez une image pour votre profil." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-helper-text"/> <Button text="Choisir une photo" onAction="#onBrowsePhoto" styleClass="auth-secondary-button"/> </VBox> </HBox> </VBox> </VBox>
<Label fx:id="messageLabel" text="" styleClass="auth-message" wrapText="true"/>
<HBox spacing="12" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <Button fx:id="previousButton" text="Retour à l'accueil" onAction="#onPreviousStep" styleClass="auth-secondary-button"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button fx:id="nextButton" text="Suivant" onAction="#onNextStep" styleClass="auth-primary-button"/> <Button fx:id="submitButton" text="S'inscrire" onAction="#onSubmit" styleClass="auth-primary-button" visible="false" managed="false"/> </HBox>
<Hyperlink text="Vous avez déjà un compte ? Se connecter" onAction="#onBackToLanding" styleClass="auth-link-button"/> </VBox> </StackPane> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.DatePicker?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Hyperlink?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.PasswordField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleGroup?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.InscriptionController" stylesheets="@../styles/auth.css" styleClass="auth-root"> <fx:define> <ToggleGroup fx:id="roleToggleGroup"/> </fx:define>
<left> <VBox spacing="18" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="auth-signup-hero"> <padding> <Insets top="44" right="44" bottom="44" left="44"/> </padding> <Label text="Artium" styleClass="auth-brand"/> <Label text="Explore the World" styleClass="auth-hero-title"/> <Label text="Rejoignez votre espace desktop avec une inscription plus fluide, plus claire et plus dynamique." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-hero-text"/> <HBox spacing="10" styleClass="auth-chip-row"> <Label text="Rapide" styleClass="auth-chip"/> <Label text="Sécurisé" styleClass="auth-chip"/> <Label text="Guidé" styleClass="auth-chip"/> </HBox> </VBox> </left>
<center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="auth-scroll"> <content> <StackPane styleClass="auth-signup-shell"> <VBox spacing="18" maxWidth="720" styleClass="auth-card auth-signup-card"> <padding> <Insets top="34" right="34" bottom="34" left="34"/> </padding>
<VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Créer un compte" styleClass="auth-title"/> <Label text="Remplissez les informations en 3 étapes pour garder une expérience propre et lisible." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-subtitle"/> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="10" styleClass="auth-stepper"> <Label fx:id="stepOneBadge" text="1" styleClass="auth-step-badge active"/> <Label fx:id="stepTwoBadge" text="2" styleClass="auth-step-badge"/> <Label fx:id="stepThreeBadge" text="3" styleClass="auth-step-badge"/> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="stepOnePane" spacing="12"> <Label text="Informations personnelles" styleClass="auth-section-title"/> <GridPane hgap="12" vgap="12"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> </columnConstraints>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"> <Label text="Nom" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="nomField" promptText="Entrez le nom" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1"> <Label text="Prénom" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="prenomField" promptText="Entrez le prénom" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"> <Label text="Date de naissance" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <DatePicker fx:id="dateNaissancePicker" promptText="jj/mm/aaaa" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1"> <Label text="Téléphone" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="phoneField" promptText="+216 XX XXX XXX" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.columnSpan="2"> <Label text="Ville" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="villeField" promptText="Entrez la ville" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox> </GridPane> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="stepTwoPane" spacing="12" visible="false" managed="false"> <Label text="Informations de connexion" styleClass="auth-section-title"/> <GridPane hgap="12" vgap="12"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> </columnConstraints>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.columnSpan="2"> <Label text="Adresse e-mail" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="emailField" promptText="Votre adresse e-mail" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"> <Label text="Mot de passe" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <PasswordField fx:id="passwordField" promptText="Au moins 8 caractères" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1"> <Label text="Confirmation" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <PasswordField fx:id="confirmPasswordField" promptText="Répétez le mot de passe" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox> </GridPane> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="stepThreePane" spacing="12" visible="false" managed="false"> <Label text="Rôle et compléments" styleClass="auth-section-title"/> <HBox spacing="10" styleClass="auth-role-row"> <ToggleButton text="Amateur" toggleGroup="$roleToggleGroup" selected="true" styleClass="auth-role-toggle"/> <ToggleButton text="Artiste" toggleGroup="$roleToggleGroup" styleClass="auth-role-toggle"/> <ToggleButton text="Admin" toggleGroup="$roleToggleGroup" styleClass="auth-role-toggle"/> </HBox>
<GridPane hgap="12" vgap="12"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <ColumnConstraints percentWidth="50" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> </columnConstraints>
<VBox fx:id="specialiteContainer" spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"> <Label text="Spécialité" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <ComboBox fx:id="specialiteComboBox" promptText="Choisissez une spécialité" maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="centreInteretContainer" spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"> <Label text="Centre d'intérêt" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <ComboBox fx:id="centreInteretComboBox" promptText="Choisissez un centre d'intérêt" maxWidth="Infinity" styleClass="auth-input"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.columnSpan="2"> <Label text="Biographie" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <TextArea fx:id="biographieArea" promptText="Parlez-nous de vous..." prefRowCount="4" wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-input auth-textarea"/> </VBox> </GridPane>
<VBox spacing="8"> <Label text="Photo de référence" styleClass="auth-field-label"/> <HBox spacing="14" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <StackPane styleClass="auth-photo-preview"> <Label fx:id="photoPlaceholderLabel" text="Aucune photo" styleClass="auth-photo-placeholder"/> </StackPane> <VBox spacing="6" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="photoPathLabel" text="Sélectionnez une image pour votre profil." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-helper-text"/> <Button text="Choisir une photo" onAction="#onBrowsePhoto" styleClass="auth-secondary-button"/> </VBox> </HBox> </VBox> </VBox>
<Label fx:id="messageLabel" text="" styleClass="auth-message" wrapText="true"/>
<HBox spacing="12" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <Button fx:id="previousButton" text="Retour à l'accueil" onAction="#onPreviousStep" styleClass="auth-secondary-button"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button fx:id="nextButton" text="Suivant" onAction="#onNextStep" styleClass="auth-primary-button"/> <Button fx:id="submitButton" text="S'inscrire" onAction="#onSubmit" styleClass="auth-primary-button" visible="false" managed="false"/> </HBox>
<Hyperlink text="Vous avez déjà un compte ? Se connecter" onAction="#onBackToLanding" styleClass="auth-link-button"/> </VBox> </StackPane> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
